store_headline: WooCommerce Theme Built for Print-on-Demand Businesses
store_subheadline: For print-on-demand businesses and custom merchandise sellers with zero inventory headaches
features: Product variation swatches for material, size, and color options
Currency switcher for international print-on-demand sales
WPBakery Page Builder with custom content blocks
Wishlist functionality for custom print products
Pop-up displays for promotions and new designs
Video thumbnail generation for product demonstrations
Mobile-optimized responsive design for all devices
One-click demo import with complete POD store setup
Built with WPBakery Page Builder ($99 value)
selling_points: The only WooCommerce theme in the catalog designed specifically for the print-on-demand workflow
Zero-inventory architecture: the entire storefront is built for businesses where production follows purchase
Currency switcher for international POD sales built in — reach Printful, Printify, and Gelato customers globally
Promo code hero section built to drive promotion-led conversions — the lifeblood of POD economics
Visual variation swatches for material, size, and color — the product UX POD customers need to decide
WPBakery-powered for custom landing pages that showcase designs without generic e-commerce conventions
MailChimp newsletter integration for list-building — the repeat-purchase engine for zero-inventory businesses
Wolf Popup for campaign launches and limited-edition drops that create the urgency POD stores depend on
key_benefits: Launch a store built for print-on-demand — not adapted from inventory retail
Sell custom merchandise internationally from day one with built-in currency conversion
Convert hesitant buyers with visual swatches, wishlists, and clean product pages
Build an email list — the repeat-purchase engine for zero-inventory businesses
Drive urgency with popup campaigns for new design drops and limited-edition runs
Operate a credible branded storefront without carrying a single unit of stock
Scale with the only WolfTheme infrastructure designed specifically for the POD model
design_features: Newsletter signup forms with MailChimp integration

testimonials.text: As a graphic artist selling my designs on various products, I needed a theme that could showcase my work effectively. Staaw exceeded my expectations with its clean design and excellent product display options. The Instagram feed integration helps me show my products in real-world settings.
testimonials.author: designerprints

testimonials.text: The pop-up functionality and MailChimp integration have dramatically improved our email marketing efforts. We've seen a 40% increase in subscriber signups since switching to Staaw, and the WooCommerce wishlist feature has significantly boosted our repeat customer rate.
testimonials.author: printbusinessowner
